transcript: You know, if this is an obscene phone call... you know, this is a business. And I don't have time for your little games that you're playing.
[accented] He's gonna be... head-is-foot at your lip in a minute, young man.
[in background] He'll keep you on the phone for twenty-five minutes!
[accented] How would you like Gugliotta at your HEAD-ehhh?
[changing accent] What up, man? This is Todd. Seriously bro, what up, man?
What up, man? What you doing?
[accented] Did you watch fuckin'... Fonzie Loves Chachi, or whatever?
[accented] Oh, man... fuck, fuckin' what up, man? Shit.
